P1-005_cmdk_command_palette.notes: cmdk integration clean. Ctrl+K/Cmd+K shortcut with proper cleanup. RBAC-aware item filtering via useIsAdmin. Navigation, theme toggle, keyboard shortcut actions present. ESC and backdrop-click dismiss work.

P1-003_card_table_styles.notes: Padding normalized px-3->px-4. Status dot improved h-1.5->h-2. Font sizes consistent. Row hover includes shadow depth effect. Env badges rounded-md. Clean and consistent changes.

P1-008_responsive_layout.notes: E2E confirms responsive layout. CommandPalette uses max-w-lg + mx-4 for mobile safety.

P1-010_pod_action_ordering.notes: View before Delete ordering maintained and verified by E2E.

P1-002_view_navigation.notes: cmdk enables fast keyboard navigation between views via useRouter SPA transitions.

theme_toggle.notes: Theme toggle in cmdk uses DOM querySelector - minor coupling concern but functional.

RBAC.notes: adminOnly items filtered in CommandPalette via useIsAdmin hook. Consistent with app RBAC pattern.

code_quality.notes: CSS custom variables used consistently. Components small and focused. Minor: CommandPalette overlay role=presentation instead of role=dialog+aria-modal. DOM querySelector for theme toggle is a code smell but low risk.

accessibility.notes: cmdk library handles ARIA internally. ESC closes, arrow keys navigate. Tab trap not explicitly verified. Minor gap, acceptable.

issues.title: cmdk theme toggle uses DOM querySelector
issues.recommendation: Refactor to use React context or custom event in future iteration.

issues.title: CommandPalette overlay missing aria-modal
issues.recommendation: Add role=dialog + aria-modal=true to overlay wrapper in next UX pass.

notes: v156 UX improvements well-executed. cmdk (P1-005) is the headline feature - keyboard-first navigation feels native. Card/table normalization (P1-003) improves visual consistency. Minor a11y and code coupling issues logged, do not block. E2E 85/0/11 PASS with 0 failures. Score: 8.7/10 -> PASS.
